query: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.get_change_tolerence(); CREATE FUNCTION public.get_change_tolerence() RETURNS TABLE(initiative_id text, impacted_bu text, wave text, overall_impact text) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t."InitiativeID"::text, t."Impacted BU"::text, t."Wave"::text, t."OverAll Impact"::text FROM "TMC"."Change -  Tolerence" t; END; $X$; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.get_change_tolerence() TO anon, authenticated;
